nasb.text: For the Lord God of hosts has a day of panic, subjugation and confusion In the valley of vision, A breaking down of walls And a crying to the mountain.

esv.text: For the Lord God of hosts has a day of tumult and trampling and confusion in the valley of vision, a battering down of walls and a shouting to the mountains.

cnv.text: 因為主萬軍之耶和華 使“異象谷”有驚恐、踐踏、混亂的日子： 城牆被拆毀， 哀聲傳到山上。

ccb.text: 主——万军之耶和华已经定了日子， 要使耶路撒冷饱受恐慌、 失败和混乱， 城墙被攻破， 哭喊声响彻山间。

csbs.text: 因为主万军之耶和华定了一个日子， 在“异象谷”必有骚乱、践踏和惊扰—— 城墙被攻破，呼救声达到山上。
